basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Project Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. For SC/ST/OBC and women candidates, age relaxation will be applicable as per GoI.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering/ Production / Automation/ Mechatronics/ Industrial & Production from a recognized university or equivalent with four years experience in Research and development OR Doctorate Degree in Engineering
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering/ Production / Automation/ Mechatronics/ Industrial & Production from a recognized university or equivalent with four years experience in Research and development in industrial/academic institution/research and technology organization and scientific activities and services OR Doctorate Degree in Engineering.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30-05-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, Production, Automation, Mechatronics, or Industrial & Production with four years of relevant experience, or a Doctorate Degree in Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Project Associate position is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC and women candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Senior Project Associate job?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. You must prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contractual basis for the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT(ISM) Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
